claim: WHO/UNICEF JMP estimates 2 billion people drink fecally contaminated water. Fewer than 30 countries report sub-national E. coli data, and fewer than 15 have nationally representative water-quality surveys.

source.title: JMP Progress on Drinking Water, Sanitation and Hygiene 2024

method: Reviewed JMP report water-quality chapters, data availability, and monitoring gaps.
limitations: Water-quality data depends on national testing programs which are sparse in most LMICs.
JMP estimates are modeled where testing data is absent.
